name: mcp-defense-bench
description: Vendor-neutral benchmark scoring MCP security proxies/gateways on attack-surface coverage, crosswalked to NIST AI RMF and the OWASP LLM/Agentic Top 10s.

scripts.bench:bastion: node scripts/gen-testcases.mjs && node bin/run.mjs mcp-bastion && node bin/assert-floor.mjs mcp-bastion

author: Gowthaman Arumugam <agowthaman90@gmail.com> (https://github.com/Gowthaman90)
